ats_utilities.config_io.xml.default_xml_processor module¶

Info

Defines class ATSXmlProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation for processing XML content.

class ats_utilities.config_io.xml.default_xml_processor.ATSXmlProcessor[source]¶

Bases: IXMLProcessor

Defines class ATSXmlProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation for processing XML content.

It defines:

attributes:
__root - Root element of the XML document.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ATSXmlProcessor constructor.
from_string - Load XML content from string.
to_string - Convert XML content to string.
get_ats_info - Get ATS information from XML.
__get_val(tag: str) → str¶

Internal helper for getting tag value.

Parameters:

tag (<str>) – XML tag name

Returns:

Tag value or empty string

Return type:

<str>

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
from_string(xml_content: str) → bool[source]¶

Load XML content from string.

Parameters:

xml_content (<str>) – XML content as string

Returns:

True (content loaded) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

get_ats_info() → Dict[str, str][source]¶

Get ATS information from XML.

Returns:

Dictionary with ATS information

Return type:

<Dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None

to_string() → str[source]¶

Convert XML content to string.

Returns:

XML content as string

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None
